\section{Professional Summary}
Software Development Engineer with 3+ years of experience in test automation, Python scripting, and system integration across Linux-based environments. Proficient in designing scalable automation frameworks, CI/CD pipelines, and containerized deployments using Docker and Kubernetes. Strong problem-solver with expertise in Agile delivery, IP networking concepts, and high-availability system design.
